scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/probe-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/a11y-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/probe-report build && next build
scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/probe-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/a11y-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @bsns/probe-report build && next dev
